# Pull Request

## 🔗 Issue link
Closes #
Relates to #

## 🧩 Type of change
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🧹 Maintenance / refactor
- [ ] 🩹 Simple patch (small, safe change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 CI / tooling

## 📝 Summary / context
<!-- What changed and why? Keep it short and easy to review. -->

## 🔖 Semantic Versioning (target release)
- [ ] PATCH (bug fixes / small changes)
- [ ] MINOR (new functionality)
- [ ] MAJOR (breaking changes)
Target version (optional): `X.Y.Z`

## ✅ Developer checks
<!-- Tick what applies. If not applicable, leave unchecked. -->
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (or not needed)
- [ ] R CMD check passing (or CI green) (`devtools::check()`)
- [ ] Linters/styling run (if used in repo) (`lintr::lint_package()`, `styler::style_pkg()`)
- [ ] Docs/examples updated (if user-facing) (`devtools::document()`)
- [ ] No UI breaking changes (or clearly documented)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered (or migration note added)

## ✅ Reviewer checks
- [ ] Manual testing done (or not needed) — add notes below if helpful
- [ ] Tests are done (or not needed)
- [ ] Code review ready (focused diff, clear commits)
- [ ] Basic sanity checked (no debug leftovers, no accidental files)

## 📎 Additional information (optional)
<!-- Examples, screenshots, reviewer notes, follow-ups, known limitations. -->
